---
title: "Public APIs and Datasets"
description: "World Bank, ACLED, NOAA, arXiv, Lichess — live data for game-theoretic analysis."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
60 TUTORIALS
:::

# Public APIs and Datasets

World Bank, ACLED, NOAA, arXiv, Lichess — live data for game-theoretic analysis.
